arts.ttl: West Ham vs Man City: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Marco Silva's side, who lost Joao Palhinha to Bayern Munich over the summer, started the campaign with a late 1-0 defeat at Manchester United before winning their home opener against Leicester 2-1. West Ham will be hoping to enjoy a less humiliating visit to Craven Cottage as they take on Fulham in the Premier League this weekend.
